summary: Premium mobile UI redesign - test suite updated to match new UI. Tests cover: dark premium interface, conversation-first build feed with empty state and quick action suggestions, sticky bottom agent dock with input field, mobile header with project name/status/preview/menu buttons, mobile preview CTA, responsive breakpoint switching (<768px mobile, >=768px desktop), and desktop IDE layout.

issues.description: Intermittent test failures due to Cloudflare security verification page appearing during automated testing. Tests pass on retry. This is an infrastructure issue, not a code bug.
issues.endpoint_or_component: All desktop tests when Cloudflare triggers

test_results.frontend: 94% (45/48 tests pass - 3 flaky due to Cloudflare)

seed_data_creation: Uses existing demo project 'proj-demo-1' (todo-app) with files: index.html, styles.css, script.js, README.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium mobile UI redesign verified. Test suite updated to match new UI text and structure. Mobile builder now shows 'Ready' instead of 'Connected' status, quick actions show 'Add feature' instead of 'Add a feature', desktop shows 'Files' instead of 'FILES'. Tests cover: MobileBuilderHeader (project name, status, preview/menu buttons), MobileAgentDock (input field, send button, quick actions), MobileConversationFeed (empty state with suggestions), MobilePreviewCTA (floating preview button), responsive breakpoints, and desktop IDE layout. Some tests are flaky due to Cloudflare security intermittently triggering during automated testing.
